title: Alseodaphne archboldiana
taxonomy: Alseodaphne archboldiana is a species of plant in the family Lauraceae. It is a woody plant native to the tropical regions of New Guinea. Alseodaphne archboldiana is classified under the genus Alseodaphne, which belongs to the family Lauraceae. The plant is often found in the mountainous regions of New Guinea and is characterized by its fragrant leaves and woody stems. Alseodaphne archboldiana is a relatively rare species and is considered to be of scientific interest due to its unique characteristics.
